title: Jeffrey Donaldson, Longtime Northern Irish Political Leader, Is Convicted of Child Sex Abuse
summary_full: Mr. Donaldson, 63, was found guilty after a weekslong jury trial in Northern Ireland.
summary_public: Mr. Donaldson, 63, was found guilty after a weekslong jury trial in Northern Ireland.
